subcodes.first_line: Say: All praise be unto Thee, O my God and my Heart's Desire, for having sent down unto me in the Most Great Prison that which none can rival [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل لک الحمد یا الهی و مقصودی بما انزلت لی فی السجن الاعظم ما لا یعادله
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @prayer for nearness to God, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @suffering and imprisonment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
